.aiwg/AIWG.md.summary: <!-- aiwg-managed --> <!-- Normalized project-local AIWG context. Operator notes may live outside AIWG-managed blocks. --> This file is the stable `.aiwg/AIWG.md` entry point for AIWG skills, rules, and generated provider context. <!-- aiwg-context-finalization:START --> This section is synthesized after template emission from the current workspace state. Preserve operator-authored content outside AIWG-managed blocks; rerun `aiwg regenerate` to refresh this section after provider, framework, or

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0001-postiz-posti.title: ADR-0001: Adopt Postiz as the scheduling + posting layer
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0001-postiz-posti.summary: **Status**: Accepted **Date**: 2026-07-04 **Decision owner**: Solo operator The pipeline needs cross-platform publishing + scheduling (YouTube first-class, plus TikTok, Instagram, X, Reddit, etc.). We had planned to hand-roll per-platform adapters (OAuth, upload flows, quotas, retries) — significant, brittle, per-platform work that fights platform API gating and changes constantly. Postiz (`gitroomhq/postiz-app`) is a mature open-source social scheduling tool that already solves this.

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0002-own-event-st.title: ADR-0002: Own the raw event store; treat memory engines as derived indexes
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0002-own-event-st.summary: **Status**: Accepted **Date**: 2026-07-04 The pipeline's long-term value is compounding learning across experiments. Memory frameworks (Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, Cognee, pgGraph) each have their own storage models; committing our source of truth to any one of them creates lock-in and makes migration a salvage job. Own the **raw event store** as the single source of truth: local **Postgres** (relational rows) + local **object storage/filesystem** (media, screenshots, transcripts, product pages, generat

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0003-local-postgr.title: ADR-0003: Use local Postgres + pgGraph + pgvector as the v1 memory substrate
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0003-local-postgr.summary: **Status**: Accepted for local MVP; revisit after week-2 bake-off **Date**: 2026-07-04 The project needs episodic, semantic, and procedural memory without context rot. We evaluated agentmemory as the reference pattern and considered Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, Cognee, Letta/MemGPT, and pgGraph. For week 1, the system is local, solo-operated, and needs a simple, inspectable substrate. We already own Postgres as the raw event store. Use **local Postgres + pgGraph + pgvector** as the v1 memory substrate:

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0004-claude-fable.title: ADR-0004: Use Claude Code CLI (`claude-fable-5`) as the video director runtime
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0004-claude-fable.summary: **Status**: Accepted **Date**: 2026-07-04 The project needs a "director" for videos: an agentic role that reads niche research, official reference packs, persona briefs, compliance rules, benchmark gold sets, and produces/coordinates shot direction, scripts, generation prompts, and quality review. The user wants this director to run from a **Claude Code CLI session inside this project**, not as an opaque hosted model call embedded in the app. Use the local `claude` CLI from this repository as th

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0005-human-gated-.title: ADR-0005: Human-gated Jarvis content-agent orchestration
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0005-human-gated-.summary: **Status**: Accepted   **Date**: 2026-07-04   **Decision owner**: Solo operator The Codex, Aside/Fugu, and Claude Code sessions repeatedly converged on the same operating model: a Jarvis-style content factory that can research trends, synthesize hooks, generate original assets, prepare posts, and learn from results. The useful parts of that model are not full autonomy; they are repeatable orchestration, persistent memory, and disciplined gates around spending, publishing, account actions, and cl

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0006-virality-fir.title: ADR-0006: Virality-first lane selection and persona-optional form
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0006-virality-fir.summary: **Status**: Accepted   **Date**: 2026-07-04   **Decision owner**: Solo operator Across the Claude Code and Codex/Fugu transcripts, the operating doctrine evolved from "make persona content" into "build Memetics as a virality engine." The persona system still matters for brand recognition, but forcing every post through a persona can lower trend fit, slow execution, and make the factory less responsive to high-velocity moments. The observed creator playbooks also showed that platform payouts are

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0007-memory-syste.title: ADR-0007: Memory system of record and week-2 bakeoff
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0007-memory-syste.summary: **Status**: Accepted for MVP; bakeoff pending after first result loop   **Date**: 2026-07-04   **Decision owner**: Solo operator The project currently uses several memory surfaces: - agentmemory for coding-agent session memory and handoff/recall,

.aiwg/architecture/adr-0008-draft-ramp-a.title: ADR-0008: Draft Ramp and Analytics Aggregation
.aiwg/architecture/adr-0008-draft-ramp-a.summary: **Date**: 2026-07-04   **Status**: Accepted   **Decision Owner**: Operator The operator approved moving past the previous zero-cap boundary: generate Shorts under an adaptive credit-learning policy, approve the first 100 Postiz drafts, and capture all video analytics in one aggregated place. Postiz appears to expose platform/post analytics through its public/agent API surface, but the content factory needs metrics joined to packages, creatives, costs, funnels, and lessons. 1. Treat Postiz as a s

.aiwg/architecture/software-architecture.title: Software Architecture Document (SAD) — Affiliate Content Pipeline (MVP)
.aiwg/architecture/software-architecture.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-04 **Status**: Elaboration baseline with Controlled Construction addendum **Scope**: Local, solo-operated GTA6 AI-persona gaming content pipeline (Beachhead A), YouTube-first. - Local-first, single operator, runs on one macOS machine. - Research-first; compounding memory without context rot.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/benchm.title: Agent: benchmark-scout
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/benchm.summary: Role: uses Aside Browser to read logged-in Instagram/TikTok/YouTube surfaces and produce structured benchmark observations. Never likes, comments, follows, DMs, or scrapes private APIs.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/benchm.name: benchmark-scout
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/benchm.capability: Role: uses Aside Browser to read logged-in Instagram/TikTok/YouTube surfaces and produce structured benchmark observations.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/compli.title: Agent: compliance-gatekeeper
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/compli.summary: Role: blocks risky content before spend and before publish. Primary command: `aflack compliance-smoke`; content-specific checks must include source provenance and disclosure review.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/compli.name: compliance-gatekeeper
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/compli.capability: Role: blocks risky content before spend and before publish.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/insigh.title: Agent: insight-curator
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/insigh.summary: Role: dedupes observations, strengthens or retires insights, and prevents context rot. Primary tools: `aflack improve-cycle`, `aflack insights-list`, `aflack trace-show`.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/insigh.name: insight-curator
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/insigh.capability: Role: dedupes observations, strengthens or retires insights, and prevents context rot.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/roi-se.title: Agent: roi-sentinel
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/roi-se.summary: Role: prevents scaling when contribution margin is negative or unmeasured. Primary command: `aflack economics-status` plus per-video cost ledger review.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/roi-se.name: roi-sentinel
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/roi-se.capability: Role: prevents scaling when contribution margin is negative or unmeasured.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/video-.title: Agent: video-director
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/video-.summary: Role: Claude Code session that turns active insights into pre-generation video packages. Hard stop before paid generation and publishing.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/video-.name: video-director
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/agents/video-.capability: Role: Claude Code session that turns active insights into pre-generation video packages.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/behaviors/sch.title: Behavior: scheduled-improvement-daemon
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/behaviors/sch.summary: The daemon periodically runs the safe learning loop. It may create insights/proposals and traces. It may not generate, publish, edit account settings, automate DMs/comments, or silently modify skills/rules.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/complia.title: Rule: compliance-before-publish
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/complia.summary: No content may be submitted for public publishing unless it passes: - source provenance check, - AI/synthetic disclosure check, - affiliate disclosure check, - no false firsthand/access/leak claims,
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/complia.name: compliance-before-publish
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/complia.capability: No content may be submitted for public publishing unless it passes:

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/memory-.title: Rule: memory-without-rot
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/memory-.summary: All learned content patterns must be deduped, evidence-bound, and temporally valid. - Dedup by stable content hash. - Reinforce existing insights instead of duplicating them. - Retire stale insights with `invalid_at` rather than deleting history. - Retrieve only active, relevant, high-confidence insights into working context.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/memory-.name: memory-without-rot
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/memory-.capability: All learned content patterns must be deduped, evidence-bound, and temporally valid.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/no-safe.title: Rule: no-safe-boring-generation
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/no-safe.summary: Compliance is necessary but not sufficient. Do not spend generation credits on asset prompts that are merely clean, generic, or product-adjacent. Before a prompt reaches spend review, it must prove: - why the target audience cares in the first frame, - how the asset relates positively to the current story window,
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/no-safe.name: no-safe-boring-generation
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/no-safe.capability: Compliance is necessary but not sufficient. Do not spend generation credits on asset prompts that are merely clean, generic, or product-adjacent.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/proof-o.title: Rule: proof-of-real-success
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/proof-o.summary: Do not treat a creator as a model to learn from merely because they show large numbers, luxury flexing, or claimed revenue. A creator becomes `verified` only when at least three evidence signals are present: 1. observable engagement rate >= 2%, 2. observable monetization path (affiliate, own product, course, sponsor, platform payout, etc.), 3. sustained cadence >= 14 days.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/proof-o.name: proof-of-real-success
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/proof-o.capability: Do not treat a creator as a model to learn from merely because they show large numbers, luxury flexing, or claimed revenue.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/researc.title: Rule: research-before-generation
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/researc.summary: Before any paid Higgsfield generation, a video package must cite either: - an existing benchmark pattern from `benchmark_videos` / `insights`, or - a human-approved creative hypothesis explicitly marked as experimental. No credit spend is allowed for vague, unsupported ideas.
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/researc.name: research-before-generation
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/researc.capability: Before any paid Higgsfield generation, a video package must cite either:

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/roi-bef.title: Rule: roi-before-scale
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/roi-bef.summary: Do not scale toward 20 videos/day until the loop has positive contribution margin or an explicit experimental budget. Track: - Higgsfield credits/video, - token cost/video, - operator minutes/video,
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/roi-bef.name: roi-before-scale
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/roi-bef.capability: Do not scale toward 20 videos/day until the loop has positive contribution margin or an explicit experimental budget.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/testabl.title: Testable Contracts over Prose
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/rules/testabl.summary: **Status**: active   **Applies to**: skills, rules, workflows, agents, daemon behaviors, content package generators, and validation gates Agentic instructions must be written as testable contracts whenever the behavior affects pipeline quality, safety, money, public publishing, or memory promotion. .aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/templates/asi.title: Untitled
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/templates/asi.summary: Use Aside Browser in read-only mode. Inspect logged-in Instagram/TikTok/YouTube surfaces for the niche: {{niche}}. Find creators/videos that appear genuinely successful. Do not rely on follower count or wealth flexing alone. For each candidate, capture observable engagement, monetization path, cadence proof, hook, CTA, and structure. Do not like, comment, follow, DM, post, change settings, or call private APIs. Return only JSON matching `.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/templates/aside-scan.schema.jso

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/workflows/ana.title: Workflow: analytics-to-memory
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/workflows/ana.summary: 1. Ingest results from platform/Postiz. 2. Update `results` and `cost_ledger`. 3. Compare against benchmark expectations. 4. Distill episodic lessons. 5. Promote repeated lessons into semantic/procedural insights.

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/workflows/ben.title: Workflow: benchmark-to-skill-update
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/workflows/ben.summary: 1. `aflack aside-scan-import <scan.json>` 2. `aflack improve-cycle` 3. `aflack insights-list --min-confidence 0.5` 4. `aflack proposals-list` 5. human reviews proposal

.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/workflows/cla.title: Workflow: claude-video-production
.aiwg/creator-commerce-ops/workflows/cla.summary: 1. Retrieve active insights. 2. Create hook options using `hook-authoring`. 3. Create Claude Code video builder prompt. 4. Generate pre-generation package only. 5. Convert storyboard into a beat-level prompt pack using `higgsfield-asset-prompting`.

They present ORIGINAL commentary/analysis over ORIGINAL or clearly-licensed visuals — never wholesale reposts of Rockstar pre-release footage. - Synthetic/AI-assisted persona; not a real person; no impersonation of any real individual. - No false firsthand claims ("I played the leaked build"), no leaked/pre-release footage.

.aiwg/marketing/strategy/niche-diagnosti.title: Niche Diagnostic Plan — Affiliate Content Pipeline
.aiwg/marketing/strategy/niche-diagnosti.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-03 Start with a narrow niche, prove the repeatable pipeline, then clone the system into adjacent niches. Score each candidate niche 1–5: 1. **Content velocity** — enough daily examples/trends to learn from. 2. **Visual demo strength** — product benefit can be shown in short-form video.

.aiwg/reports/psi-and-deterministic-agen.title: PSI and Deterministic Agent Lessons

.aiwg/research/affiliate-content-pipelin.title: Learnings Digest — Downey.ai / Jarvis / Higgsfield MCP Blueprint
.aiwg/research/affiliate-content-pipelin.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-04 **Source**: User-provided evidence-bounded teardown of @downey.ai, LukeBuildsAI "Jarvis", and Higgsfield MCP. **Discipline adopted**: keep OBSERVED vs INFERRED separate (their addendum does this well; we mirror it). Visual spectacle (Higgsfield) → curiosity/business hook → ONE-WORD comment CTA → DM delivers a guide/lead magnet (with affiliate link) → capture audience → iterate. The post's job is to trigger the keyword comment; the DM/lead magnet is the real conversion ass

.aiwg/research/findings/REF-001.md.title: Long-Term Memory System — Research & Architecture Direction
.aiwg/research/findings/REF-001.md.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-03 **Purpose**: Design a durable "company memory" for the content-creation + marketing pipeline: never forgets, de-duplicates, resists context rot, holds episodic + semantic + procedural memory, and injects only relevant memory on demand (not jammed into every context). Starting reference: agentmemory (coding-focused). Research-first; benchmark 2-3 candidates on our own data before committing. > Sources: web research 2026-07-03 (multiple 2026 framework comparisons) + local a

.aiwg/research/findings/REF-002.md.title: pgGraph Evaluation Note
.aiwg/research/findings/REF-002.md.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-03 **Candidate**: <https://github.com/Evokoa/pgGraph> **Purpose**: Evaluate pgGraph as the local graph layer for the affiliate/content pipeline memory/event store. pgGraph is a PostgreSQL extension that adds graph search, traversal, shortest-path, and relationship queries directly over ordinary PostgreSQL tables. The key fit for this project:

.aiwg/research/findings/REF-003.md.title: Data Sources, Indexers & Benchmarking Layer
.aiwg/research/findings/REF-003.md.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-03 **Purpose**: Catalog the top APIs, indexers, and aggregators for winning products and winning videos, so the pipeline can continuously benchmark our AI-generated content against the best creators ("crème de la crème") and validate before/after publishing. Research-first; verify pricing/access live before committing. > Sources: web research 2026-07-03 (industry comparison articles + official TikTok surfaces). Treat all third-party GMV/sales numbers as estimates, not truth.

.aiwg/research/findings/REF-004.md.title: How $100k+/mo Short-Form Creators Engineer Virality — Operator Playbooks
.aiwg/research/findings/REF-004.md.summary: Full structured agent output preserved in this file's source run (Firecrawl job 019f2e79-74ff-758b-b51c-389a01750d3d). Key findings below, hedged per GRADE. - **Jenny Hoyos** (600M views/yr, avg 10M/video): hook + foreshadowing in ≤3s; first 3s must communicate value **without audio**; 5th-grade readability; power words ("banned, free, one dollar, secret, cheap"); target length exactly 34s; retention floor 90% (100%+ via rewatch for <30s). ([marketingexamined](https://www.marketingexamined.com/b

.aiwg/security/compliance-gta6-footage.m.title: Compliance Decision — GTA6 Footage Handling
.aiwg/security/compliance-gta6-footage.m.summary: **Created**: 2026-07-04 **Status**: BLOCKING RULE for the gta6-ai-persona-gaming niche "Take official GTA6 pre-release video footage, clip it, and remix/regenerate new content from the same seed as the pre-release gameplay." Grounds: 1. **Pre-release footage is the hardest red line.** Rockstar/Take-Two policy: postings of in-game footage before official release are removed regardless of how obtained. GTA6 is unreleased (launch 2026-11-19).
